channel.title: 6-8 件事 (2026/3/19)
channel.description: 今天 GitHub Trending 几乎被 AI Agent 和编程辅助工具“霸榜”了，从自动化研究到浏览器控制，各种新想法层出不穷。同时，社区里关于 **AI 编程的实用性、Agent 的设计陷阱** 以及 **Claude Code 的深度使用技巧** 的讨论非常热烈，不再是泛泛而谈，而是进入了更落地的阶段。另外，关于 AI 对程序员职业影响的思考也再次被提起，挺有共鸣的。

item.title: 6-8 件事
item.description: 今天 GitHub Trending 几乎被 AI Agent 和编程辅助工具“霸榜”了，从自动化研究到浏览器控制，各种新想法层出不穷。同时，社区里关于 **AI 编程的实用性、Agent 的设计陷阱** 以及 **Claude Code 的深度使用技巧** 的讨论非常热烈，不再是泛泛而谈，而是进入了更落地的阶段。另外，关于 AI 对程序员职业影响的思考也再次被提起，挺有共鸣的。

item.title: aiming-lab/AutoResearchClaw
item.description: Fully autonomous & self-evolving research from idea to paper. Chat an Idea. Get a Paper. 🦞 | 近期热门 | 总 6297 stars
item.author: aiming-lab

item.title: calesthio/Crucix
item.description: Your personal intelligence agent. Watches the world from multiple data sources and pings you when something changes. | 近期热门 | 总 4574 stars
item.author: calesthio

item.title: pasky/chrome-cdp-skill
item.description: Give your AI agent access to your live Chrome session — works out of the box, connects to tabs you already have open | 近期热门 | 总 2228 stars
item.author: pasky

item.title: jackwener/opencli
item.description: Make any website your CLI. A powerful, AI-native runtime for seamless browser automation and dynamic web data extraction. | 近期热门 | 总 1939 stars
item.author: jackwener

item.title: HKUDS/ClawTeam
item.description: ClawTeam: Agent Swarm Intelligence (One Command → Full Automation) | 近期热门 | 总 1141 stars
item.author: HKUDS

item.title: Infatoshi/OpenSquirrel
item.description: For people who get distracted by agents. A native Rust/GPUI control plane for running Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and OpenCode side by side — because if you're going to be squirrely, you might as well optimize for it. | 近期热门 | 总 1094 stars
item.author: Infatoshi

item.title: Lum1104/Understand-Anything
item.description: Claude Code skills that turn any codebase into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about. | 近期热门 | 总 913 stars
item.author: Lum1104

item.title: nikmcfly/MiroFish-Offline
item.description: Offline multi-agent simulation & prediction engine. English fork of MiroFish with Neo4j + Ollama local stack. | 近期热门 | 总 692 stars
item.author: nikmcfly
